info.title: Fluide Auth API
info.description: Developer credentials, session management, and identity for the Fluide Suite.

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness and readiness probes. Returns dependency status (database, Redis, etc.) for orchestrators and uptime monitors.

bearer.description: Access token JWT. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>. In the API playground, paste the JWT only.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret used only during token exchange. Never send on product routes.

message.description: Human-readable outcome message (localized when i18n is configured)

data.description: Response payload when success is true

message.description: Human-readable error message (localized when i18n is configured)

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code for client handling and support

errors.description: Field-level validation errors keyed by property name

from: from must be a valid date

image.description: HTTPS URL or `fluide-file:<uuid>` managed file reference

pendingToken.description: Opaque token from POST /auth/sign-in when twoFactorRequired is true.

trustDeviceLabel.description: Optional display name for audit logs.

redirectTo.description: Front-end deep-link the reset email should send the user back to.

callbackURL.description: Where the SPA wants the browser to land after a successful exchange (it gets `?token=…`).

providerId.description: SSO provider id (matches `ssoProvider.providerId`). Use this or `domain` or `email`.

domain.description: Email domain to resolve a registered SSO provider. Alternative to `providerId`.

email.description: Email address whose domain resolves the SSO provider. Alternative to `providerId`.

loginHint.description: Forwarded to the IdP as login_hint when supported.

organizationId.description: Active organization for the issued token

slug.description: Optional slug — derived from `name` when omitted (lowercase, dash-separated).

locale.description: BCP 47 locale (en | fr supported in admin)

requireMfaForOperators.description: Require MFA for partner operators on delegated engagements

ipAllowlist.description: Optional CIDR/IP allowlist entries for firm admin consoles

resend.description: Resend if a pending invite already exists for the email.

fluideClientId.description: First-party SPA the invitee is claiming the invite on behalf of.

hrAlternateEmail.description:
Optional alternate email used by the HR/payroll service to locate the canonical
employment record (e.g. when the invitation address differs from the contact email
recorded in fluide-hr).

roles.description: Organization role names used in company setup.

frequency.description: Payroll frequency used as default for company employees.

days.description: Payday(s) in month/week depending on frequency.

bankName.description: Bank name used for payroll source account.

branch.description: Branch name/code when method is manual.

accountNumber.description: Bank account number used as payroll source account.

connected.description: Whether bank connection is currently verified/connected.

walletNumber.description: Wallet number used for payroll fallback payouts.

financeOfficer.description: Finance Officer signature identifier or URL.

allowances.description: Allowance codes/names for this payroll group.

deductions.description: Deduction codes/names (e.g. CRTV, CNPS, NHS, PAYE) for this payroll group.

grossPayMode.description: How gross pay should be interpreted.

pattern.description: Format/pattern used for generated employee numbers.

currency.description: Primary company currency using ISO 4217 code.

bankConnection.description: Bank account details used for payroll funding.

signatures.description: Signature assets for approvals and generated documents.

payrollSetup.description: Payroll setup details including groups, allowances and deductions.

suspendedUntil.description: ISO8601 end of suspension; null clears suspension.

organizationNameConfirm.description: Must match the organization legal name exactly (trimmed).

companyNameConfirm.description: Must match the company legal name exactly (trimmed).

currency.description: Primary company currency using ISO 4217 code.

signatures.description: Signature assets for approvals and generated documents.

payrollSetup.description: Payroll setup details including groups, allowances and deductions.

legalAttestations.description: Legal attestations stored on the company row (subsidiary wizard).

kybSubmitted.description: True once the wizard has dispatched the KYB submission to the review queue.

stepCompleted.description: User finished the business registration onboarding step.

deferredDocumentUpload.description: User will upload KYB documents from the dashboard instead of now.

skipped.description: User chose “skip for now” on legal & compliance step.

selectedPlan.description: Plan slug stored on organization.plan (e.g. startup, essential, growth, enterprise).

skipped.description: User chose “skip for later” on billing step.

organizationStructure.description: Organization-wide department names and role labels (merged into setupData).

wizardStepCursor.description: Optional UI cursor for resume across wizard steps.

employmentOnboardingMode.description: HR_FIRST: create HR employee then optional invite. INVITE_FIRST: store HR draft then invite; HR row created when user accepts.

targetStage.description: Target onboarding stage for the active organization. Response returns updated status when transition succeeds.

note.description: Optional operator note for stage transition audit logs.

type.description: Normalized document type key agreed with frontend and reviewer panel.

url.description: Uploaded file URL (typically from file service/object storage). Required when fileId is not provided.

fileId.description: Optional file id from shared file service (`/api/v1/app/files`). When provided, KYB stores generated download URL automatically.

metadata.description: Optional free-form metadata (issuer, reference number, etc.).

applicantType.description: Submission profile. COMPANY is default for org KYB; partner values are for referral/service partner KYC-KYB.

tier.description: Verification tier. For partner profiles this is still required for scoring/policy alignment, even when requirement sets are role-specific.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Defaults to current company.countryCode when omitted.

documents.description: Uploaded documents. Use document keys that match the selected applicantType requirement set.

customRoleId.description: Assign this custom `organization_role` row (must belong to the org).

builtInRole.description: Assign a built-in org role (clears `roleId`). Mutually exclusive with `customRoleId`.

virtualManagerOrgId.description: Target VM organization (verified). XOR with virtualManagerEmail.

virtualManagerEmail.description: Invite by email — resolves an existing VM org or queues onboarding. XOR with virtualManagerOrgId.

companyId.description: Company under the calling business org that the VM will operate on.

engagementTypes.description: Module types covered by this engagement (min 1).

endDate.description: Optional planned end date (ISO timestamp). Null = open-ended.

inviteMessage.description: Optional message shown to the VM in their inbox.

description.description: Shown in ESO UIs; stored on cohort.metadata.description

businessOrganizationId.description: Business organization id (kind = BUSINESS) — Fluide Business ID (FBI) for tenants already on Fluide.

invitedEmail.description: Invite by email when the business is not on Fluide yet; queues a join link to fluide-admin.

businessCompanyId.description: Optional company id under the business.

scopeHr.description: HR module scope (defaults from operations when omitted).

scopePayroll.description: Payroll module scope (defaults from operations when omitted).

scopeAccounting.description: Accounting / books scope (defaults from financials when omitted).

token.description: Opaque token from the cohort invite email link.
Opaque token from the cohort invite email link.

businessCompanyId.description: Optional company id under the business.
